---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Eigen to do. Be concrete about the command/flow/surface.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Scope / constraints

- Does this affect the CLI, TUI/app, daemon, routing, plugins, or harness?
- Should it preserve local-first safety and explicit user control? (Eigen keeps
  the main model the user's explicit choice and gates risky actions.)

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or examples.
